name: act
summary: Run GitHub Actions workflows locally.
use_when: Reproduce GitHub Actions jobs locally
Debug workflow syntax or runner setup before pushing
avoid_when: The workflow depends on hosted-only services or protected secrets
guardrails: Inspect workflow steps before running jobs locally.

name: age
summary: Simple file encryption tool and format.
use_when: Encrypt or decrypt files with age keys
avoid_when: Key ownership or recipient identity is unclear
guardrails: Keep private keys and decrypted output out of logs and commits.

name: aider
summary: AI pair programming CLI that edits files through chat.
use_when: Use an AI coding assistant that can edit repository files
avoid_when: The user has not asked for autonomous code edits
guardrails: Review generated diffs before treating changes as accepted.

name: amp
summary: Terminal AI coding agent from Sourcegraph.
use_when: Use Amp as a terminal-native coding agent
avoid_when: The task should stay inside the current agent session
guardrails: Review generated diffs before accepting agent changes.

name: ansible
summary: Automation and configuration management CLI.
use_when: Inspect or run infrastructure automation playbooks
avoid_when: The target hosts or inventory are unclear
guardrails: Prefer check mode before applying changes to hosts.

name: ast-grep
summary: Structural code search and rewrite tool based on AST patterns.
use_when: Search code by syntax structure instead of plain text
Apply structural rewrites with reviewable patterns
avoid_when: Plain text search is sufficient
The language or syntax is not supported by the configured parser
guardrails: Preview structural rewrites before writing changes.

name: atuin
summary: Searchable shell history with optional sync.
use_when: Search shell history interactively
avoid_when: Command history may contain secrets that should not be synced
guardrails: Check sync and secret filtering settings before sharing history.

name: awk
summary: Pattern scanning and text processing language.
use_when: Transform line-oriented text streams
Summarize columns or logs from shell pipelines
avoid_when: Structured data has a proper parser available
guardrails: Use structured parsers for JSON, YAML, XML, or CSV when practical.

name: aws
summary: Amazon Web Services command-line interface.
use_when: Inspect or operate AWS resources from the terminal
avoid_when: Credentials, region, or target account are unknown
guardrails: Confirm account and region before write operations.

name: az
summary: Microsoft Azure command-line interface.
use_when: Inspect or operate Azure resources
avoid_when: Subscription, tenant, or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm active subscription before write operations.

name: bacon
summary: Background Rust checker that runs cargo tasks on changes.
use_when: Watch Rust projects while iterating on compile, clippy, or tests
avoid_when: One-shot CI validation is enough
guardrails: Stop background watchers when the task is finished.

name: bat
summary: Syntax-highlighted cat replacement for reading files.
use_when: Read source files with line numbers and syntax highlighting
avoid_when: Output must be plain machine-readable text
guardrails: Disable decorations when piping output into another parser.

name: biome
summary: Fast formatter and linter for JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, and CSS.
use_when: Lint or format projects configured for Biome
avoid_when: The repository uses ESLint and Prettier without Biome
guardrails: Prefer check mode before writing formatter or linter fixes.

name: bottom
summary: Terminal system monitor for processes, CPU, memory, disks, and network.
use_when: Inspect system resource usage interactively
avoid_when: Non-interactive scripts need stable process output
guardrails: Use non-interactive commands for scripted diagnostics.

name: broot
summary: Interactive directory tree navigator with fuzzy search.
use_when: Explore large directory trees interactively
avoid_when: Automation needs stable plain text output
guardrails: Use non-interactive file listing commands for scripts.

name: brush
summary: Unix-like shell tool for Windows command workflows.
use_when: Running Unix-style commands on Windows when the workspace asks for brush
avoid_when: Native PowerShell cmdlets are the intended interface
guardrails: Use brush for Unix-style commands on Windows when AGENTS.md requires it.

name: buf
summary: Protobuf linting, breaking-change detection, and code generation CLI.
use_when: Lint, generate, or check Protobuf APIs
avoid_when: The repository has no Buf or Protobuf setup
guardrails: Use existing buf configuration before generating code.

name: bun
summary: JavaScript runtime and package manager.
use_when: Run Bun-managed JavaScript projects
avoid_when: The repo uses npm, pnpm, or Yarn lockfiles
guardrails: Do not mix package managers in one repository.

name: bundle
summary: Ruby dependency manager and command runner.
use_when: Install Ruby gems or run Ruby project commands
avoid_when: The repository has no Gemfile
guardrails: Use bundle exec for project-local Ruby commands.

name: cargo
summary: Rust package manager and build tool.
use_when: Build, test, and run Rust projects
avoid_when: The current project is not a Rust crate or workspace
guardrails: Use cargo for Rust build, test, and run commands when Cargo.toml exists.

name: cargo-audit
summary: Audit Rust dependency trees for known security vulnerabilities.
use_when: Check Rust dependencies against RustSec advisories
avoid_when: The project is not a Rust crate or workspace
guardrails: Treat advisories as dependency risk signals, not automatic upgrade approval.

name: cargo-binstall
summary: Install Rust binary crates from prebuilt artifacts when available.
use_when: Install Rust CLI tools faster than building from source
avoid_when: Reproducible source builds are required
guardrails: Confirm the crate and source before installing global tools.

name: cargo-clippy
summary: Rust linter distributed as a Cargo subcommand.
use_when: Run Rust lint checks
avoid_when: The current project is not a Rust crate or workspace
guardrails: Run clippy from the workspace root when Cargo.toml defines a workspace.

name: cargo-deny
summary: Rust dependency policy checker for advisories, licenses, bans, and sources.
use_when: Enforce Rust dependency license, advisory, and source policies
avoid_when: The project has no Rust dependency policy
guardrails: Use existing deny.toml policy before proposing dependency changes.

name: cargo-fmt
summary: Rust formatter distributed as a Cargo subcommand.
use_when: Format Rust source files
avoid_when: The current project is not a Rust crate or workspace
guardrails: Use --check when only verifying formatting.

name: cargo-nextest
summary: Fast Rust test runner for Cargo projects.
use_when: Run Rust tests faster with better reporting
avoid_when: The project relies on cargo test behavior that nextest does not support
guardrails: Use the repository's nextest profile when configured.

name: cargo-watch
summary: Run Cargo commands whenever project files change.
use_when: Re-run Rust checks or tests during active development
avoid_when: A single deterministic command is required for CI
guardrails: Stop watchers before running final validation commands.

name: clang
summary: LLVM C, C++, and Objective-C compiler.
use_when: Compile C or C++ projects using Clang
avoid_when: The project build system selects another compiler
guardrails: Prefer the project build system over direct compiler invocations.

name: clang-format
summary: Formatter for C, C++, Objective-C, Java, JavaScript, and related languages.
use_when: Format C-family source code using project style
avoid_when: No clang-format configuration exists and style is not agreed
guardrails: Use dry-run or check mode before writing broad formatting changes.

name: clang-tidy
summary: C and C++ linter and static analysis tool.
use_when: Run C or C++ lint and static analysis checks
avoid_when: compile_commands.json or project configuration is missing
guardrails: Run analysis with the project's compile database.

name: claude
summary: Anthropic Claude Code command-line coding assistant.
use_when: Use Claude Code project instructions or workflows
avoid_when: The task should not call a separate AI coding assistant
guardrails: Review tool permissions and diffs before accepting edits.

name: clickhouse
summary: ClickHouse command-line client and local database tooling.
use_when: Query or inspect ClickHouse databases
avoid_when: Connection target or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm the target database before write queries.

name: cmake
summary: Cross-platform build system generator.
use_when: Configure, build, or test CMake projects
avoid_when: The project uses another build system and has no CMake files
guardrails: Use out-of-tree build directories or configured presets.

name: codex
summary: OpenAI Codex command-line coding agent.
use_when: Run Codex agent workflows or inspect Codex project instructions
avoid_when: The task should stay within the current agent session
guardrails: Read AGENTS.md before starting repository work.

name: composer
summary: PHP dependency manager and project command runner.
use_when: Install PHP dependencies or run Composer scripts
avoid_when: The repository has no composer.json
guardrails: Use project scripts instead of global PHP tooling when composer.json defines them.

name: corepack
summary: Node.js package manager shim for pnpm and Yarn.
use_when: Activate the package manager declared by package.json
avoid_when: The project does not declare packageManager
guardrails: Use the package manager declared by package.json when present.

name: cosign
summary: Container image and artifact signing CLI from Sigstore.
use_when: Sign or verify container images and artifacts
avoid_when: Signing identity, keyless flow, or registry target is unclear
guardrails: Verify identity, registry, and artifact digest before signing.

name: curl
summary: Command-line HTTP and network transfer client.
use_when: Test HTTP endpoints
Inspect response headers or bodies
avoid_when: Requests include secrets that could be logged
Browser behavior such as cookies or JavaScript is required
guardrails: Redact credentials and tokens from curl commands and output.

name: cursor-agent
summary: Cursor's terminal coding agent.
use_when: Use Cursor agent workflows from the terminal
avoid_when: The task should stay inside the current agent session
guardrails: Review generated changes before committing them.

name: delta
summary: Syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, and grep output.
use_when: Review diffs with syntax highlighting and side-by-side output
avoid_when: Machine-readable diff output is required
guardrails: Disable pager decoration when parsing diff output.

name: deno
summary: Secure JavaScript and TypeScript runtime with built-in tooling.
use_when: Run, test, lint, or format Deno projects
avoid_when: The repository is managed by Node package managers
guardrails: Keep Deno permission flags explicit when running untrusted code.

name: devcontainer
summary: CLI for building and running Development Containers.
use_when: Build or run repository development containers
avoid_when: The project has no devcontainer configuration
guardrails: Inspect devcontainer features and mounts before building.

name: direnv
summary: Per-directory shell environment loader.
use_when: Load project-specific environment variables and PATH changes
avoid_when: The .envrc file has not been reviewed
guardrails: Read .envrc before running direnv allow.

name: docker
summary: Container build and runtime CLI.
use_when: Build and run containerized projects
Inspect local container state
avoid_when: Docker daemon is not available
The task does not require containers
guardrails: Verify the Docker daemon before blaming project code for Docker failures.

name: docker-compose
summary: Docker Compose standalone CLI.
use_when: Manage multi-container Docker projects using Compose files
avoid_when: Docker daemon is unavailable
The project uses docker compose subcommands instead
guardrails: Verify Docker daemon availability before running Compose workflows.

name: dotnet
summary: .NET SDK command-line interface.
use_when: Build, test, run, or manage .NET projects
avoid_when: The repository has no .csproj, .fsproj, .sln, or global.json context
guardrails: Prefer solution-level commands when a .sln file defines the project set.

name: dua
summary: Disk usage analyzer for finding large files and directories.
use_when: Inspect disk usage interactively or from the terminal
avoid_when: The task only needs a simple directory listing
guardrails: Do not delete files from disk usage tools without explicit confirmation.

name: duckdb
summary: Embedded analytical database CLI.
use_when: Query local data files or embedded DuckDB databases
avoid_when: The task requires a remote transactional database
guardrails: Work on copies when experimenting with local database files.

name: dust
summary: Visual disk usage summary for directories.
use_when: Find large directories quickly
avoid_when: Exact file-level accounting is required for automation
guardrails: Limit scan scope on very large filesystems.

name: eslint
summary: JavaScript and TypeScript linting CLI.
use_when: Run JavaScript or TypeScript lint checks
avoid_when: The project has no ESLint configuration or lint script
guardrails: Prefer the package manager lint script when it exists.

name: eza
summary: Modern directory listing tool.
use_when: Inspect directories with git status, tree layout, or metadata
avoid_when: Scripts require portable POSIX ls behavior
guardrails: Use stable machine-readable commands for automation.

name: fd
summary: Fast filesystem entry finder.
use_when: Find files or directories by name
Build file lists before passing them to another command
avoid_when: Searching file contents
Structured code search
guardrails: Avoid piping fd output into destructive commands without reviewing the matched paths.

name: find
summary: GNU find for locating files by name, type, time, and predicates.
use_when: Locate files by filesystem metadata
avoid_when: fd is available and simple name matching is enough
guardrails: Print matches before deleting or executing commands over them.
On Windows, plain find.exe is usually not GNU find; prefer fd unless gfind is installed.

name: firebase
summary: Firebase project management and deployment CLI.
use_when: Deploy or inspect Firebase projects
avoid_when: Active project or authentication state is unknown
guardrails: Confirm active Firebase project before write operations.

name: flyctl
summary: Fly.io command-line tool.
use_when: Deploy or inspect Fly.io applications
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve Fly.io
guardrails: Confirm target app and organization before Fly.io write operations.

name: fnm
summary: Fast Node.js version manager.
use_when: Install or switch Node.js versions for a project
avoid_when: Node versions are managed by mise, Volta, or another configured manager
guardrails: Prefer the version manager already configured by the repository.

name: fzf
summary: General-purpose command-line fuzzy finder.
use_when: Interactively filter files, history, branches, or command output
avoid_when: Fully non-interactive automation is required
guardrails: Use explicit non-interactive filters in scripts.

name: gcc
summary: GNU Compiler Collection C and C++ compiler.
use_when: Compile C or C++ projects with GCC
avoid_when: The project build system selects another compiler
guardrails: Prefer project build scripts over ad hoc compiler commands.

name: gcloud
summary: Google Cloud command-line interface.
use_when: Inspect or operate Google Cloud resources
avoid_when: Project, account, or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm active project and account before write operations.

name: gemini
summary: Google Gemini command-line AI assistant.
use_when: Use Gemini CLI project context or AI assistant workflows
avoid_when: The task should not call a separate AI assistant
guardrails: Review repository instructions and generated diffs.

name: gh
summary: GitHub command-line interface.
use_when: Inspect GitHub pull requests, issues, and checks
Perform GitHub operations when authenticated and requested
avoid_when: Authentication state is unknown for write operations
guardrails: Verify gh auth status before write operations.

name: git
summary: Distributed version control system.
use_when: Inspect repository state and history
Stage, commit, branch, or diff changes when requested
avoid_when: Reverting user changes without explicit approval
guardrails: Never discard user changes unless explicitly requested.

name: git-lfs
summary: Git extension for large file storage.
use_when: Fetch, track, or inspect Git LFS assets
avoid_when: The repository does not use Git LFS
guardrails: Check .gitattributes before changing LFS tracking.

name: gitleaks
summary: Secret scanner for git repositories and filesystems.
use_when: Scan repositories for committed secrets
avoid_when: Findings would expose secrets in shared logs
guardrails: Redact secret values from output shared with users or logs.

name: glow
summary: Terminal Markdown renderer.
use_when: Read Markdown documentation in the terminal
avoid_when: Raw Markdown text is needed for editing or parsing
guardrails: Use raw file reads when exact Markdown syntax matters.

name: go
summary: Go toolchain for modules, build, test, and run.
use_when: Build, test, run, or manage Go modules
avoid_when: The repository has no Go module or workspace files
guardrails: Use go test ./... from the module root when validating broad changes.

name: gofmt
summary: Standard Go source formatter.
use_when: Format Go source files
avoid_when: The repository has no Go source files
guardrails: Use gofmt on touched files or gofmt -w after reviewing scope.

name: goose
summary: Open-source local AI agent framework and CLI from Block.
use_when: Run local agent workflows with Goose
avoid_when: The task should stay inside the current agent session
guardrails: Review enabled extensions and generated diffs.

name: gradle
summary: Gradle build automation CLI.
use_when: Build, test, or run Gradle projects
avoid_when: The project provides no Gradle wrapper or build file
guardrails: Prefer the project Gradle wrapper when present.

name: grep
summary: Classic line-oriented text search.
use_when: Search text in files or streams on systems without rg
avoid_when: ripgrep is available for recursive codebase search
guardrails: Prefer rg for repository-wide searches when available.

name: grpcurl
summary: Command-line gRPC client for inspecting and calling services.
use_when: Inspect or call gRPC services from the terminal
avoid_when: Target service or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm target host and method before invoking mutating RPCs.

name: grype
summary: Vulnerability scanner for container images and filesystems.
use_when: Scan images, SBOMs, or filesystems for vulnerabilities
avoid_when: The scan target is unclear or too broad
guardrails: Treat vulnerability results as triage inputs requiring version and context review.

name: hatch
summary: Python project, environment, and packaging manager.
use_when: Manage Python projects configured for Hatch
avoid_when: The project uses uv, Poetry, or another package manager
guardrails: Use Hatch only when the project configuration indicates it.

name: helix
summary: Modal terminal editor with built-in LSP and tree-sitter support.
use_when: Edit files interactively in a terminal editor
avoid_when: Non-interactive scripted edits are required
guardrails: Use scripted patch tools for auditable automated edits.

name: helm
summary: Kubernetes package manager for charts.
use_when: Work with Kubernetes Helm charts
avoid_when: The task does not involve Kubernetes chart packaging or release management
guardrails: Check Kubernetes context and namespace before Helm write operations.

name: httpie
summary: Human-friendly command-line HTTP client.
use_when: Manually inspect HTTP APIs with readable output
avoid_when: curl compatibility is required
Minimal dependency environments are preferred
guardrails: Avoid printing authorization headers or API keys.

name: hyperfine
summary: Command-line benchmarking tool.
use_when: Compare command performance with statistically useful runs
avoid_when: The command has irreversible side effects
guardrails: Benchmark commands should be repeatable and side-effect controlled.

name: java
summary: Java runtime command-line launcher.
use_when: Run Java applications or inspect JVM version
avoid_when: Build tooling should be invoked through Maven or Gradle
guardrails: Prefer project build tools for compile and test workflows.

name: jest
summary: JavaScript testing framework CLI.
use_when: Run Jest unit tests
avoid_when: The project uses Vitest, Node test runner, or another test script
guardrails: Prefer the package manager test script when configured.

name: jq
summary: Command-line JSON processor.
use_when: Query or transform JSON
Inspect machine-readable command output
avoid_when: Editing JSON files in place without validating the output
guardrails: Validate jq output before overwriting existing files.

name: just
summary: Command runner for project recipes.
use_when: Run project-defined recipes
avoid_when: Recipe behavior is unknown and may mutate state
guardrails: Inspect recipe names before running ambiguous just commands.

name: k6
summary: Load testing CLI for APIs and services.
use_when: Run configured load or performance tests
avoid_when: Target environment or rate limits are unknown

confirmation_required_for: load testing shared or production services

guardrails: Confirm target environment and test intensity before running load tests.

name: k9s
summary: Terminal UI for managing Kubernetes clusters.
use_when: Inspect Kubernetes resources interactively
avoid_when: Non-interactive automation or audit logs are required
guardrails: Confirm current Kubernetes context before mutations.

name: kind
summary: Run local Kubernetes clusters in Docker containers.
use_when: Create local Kubernetes clusters for testing
avoid_when: Docker is unavailable or the task targets a remote cluster
guardrails: Name clusters explicitly to avoid modifying the wrong local cluster.

name: kubectl
summary: Kubernetes command-line tool.
use_when: Inspect or manage Kubernetes resources
avoid_when: The current context and namespace are unknown
guardrails: Check current context and namespace before mutating Kubernetes resources.

name: kustomize
summary: Kubernetes configuration customization tool.
use_when: Build or inspect Kustomize Kubernetes manifests
avoid_when: The repository uses Helm or plain manifests without Kustomize
guardrails: Review generated manifests before applying to a cluster.

name: lazygit
summary: Terminal UI for git repositories.
use_when: Inspect and stage git changes interactively
avoid_when: Scripted git operations require exact commands
guardrails: Use explicit git commands for auditable automated workflows.

name: lsd
summary: Modern ls alternative with colors, icons, and tree output.
use_when: Inspect directories with readable colors and tree output
avoid_when: Scripts need stable portable ls output
guardrails: Use machine-oriented commands for automation.

name: make
summary: Build automation tool driven by Makefile targets.
use_when: Run project-defined build or test targets
avoid_when: Makefile targets are unknown and may mutate state
guardrails: Inspect Makefile targets before running ambiguous or destructive targets.

name: mdbook
summary: Build books and documentation sites from Markdown.
use_when: Build or serve mdBook documentation
avoid_when: The documentation site uses another generator
guardrails: Check book.toml before generating or publishing docs.

name: minikube
summary: Local Kubernetes development cluster manager.
use_when: Start or inspect a local Kubernetes cluster
avoid_when: The task targets a managed remote Kubernetes cluster
guardrails: Check current profile before mutating a minikube cluster.

name: miniserve
summary: Small CLI for serving files over HTTP.
use_when: Temporarily serve local files over HTTP
avoid_when: Files contain secrets or should not be exposed on the network
guardrails: Bind to localhost unless the user explicitly wants network exposure.

name: mise
summary: Development tool version manager and task runner.
use_when: Install or select project tool versions
Run tasks defined by mise
avoid_when: Tool versions should be managed by another project-specific manager
guardrails: Review mise.toml before installing tools from a new project.

name: mongosh
summary: MongoDB Shell for querying and administering MongoDB.
use_when: Query or inspect MongoDB databases
avoid_when: Connection target or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm database and collection before write operations.

name: mvn
summary: Apache Maven build and dependency management CLI.
use_when: Build, test, or package Maven projects
avoid_when: The repository uses Gradle or another JVM build tool
guardrails: Prefer the Maven wrapper when present.

name: mypy
summary: Static type checker for Python.
use_when: Run Python static type checks
avoid_when: The project uses a different type checker or has no mypy config
guardrails: Run mypy with the repository's configured target paths.

name: mysql
summary: MySQL command-line client.
use_when: Inspect MySQL or MariaDB databases
avoid_when: Connection target and environment are unclear
guardrails: Confirm host, database, and environment before mutating MySQL data.

name: netlify
summary: Netlify CLI for local development and deployment.
use_when: Develop or deploy Netlify projects
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve Netlify
guardrails: Confirm deployment intent before creating remote Netlify deployments.

name: ninja
summary: Small build system focused on speed.
use_when: Build projects generated for Ninja
avoid_when: The repository has no Ninja build file or preset
guardrails: Prefer the configured build directory generated by the project.

name: nix
summary: Reproducible package manager and build system.
use_when: Enter reproducible development shells or build Nix projects
avoid_when: The repo has no Nix files and another environment manager is configured
guardrails: Review flake inputs before building untrusted Nix code.

name: node
summary: JavaScript runtime for Node.js projects.
use_when: Run JavaScript tooling
Execute project scripts through the declared package manager
avoid_when: The project is not a JavaScript or TypeScript project
guardrails: Prefer the repository package manager over direct node commands for project scripts.

name: npm
summary: Node.js package manager bundled with npm.
use_when: Install and run scripts in npm-managed projects
avoid_when: The repo uses pnpm-lock.yaml, yarn.lock, or bun.lock
guardrails: Do not mix package managers in one repository.

name: nu
summary: Structured shell and scripting language.
use_when: Work with structured shell pipelines and tables
avoid_when: Scripts must run in POSIX sh, Bash, or PowerShell
guardrails: Do not assume Nushell syntax works in Bash or PowerShell.

name: op
summary: 1Password CLI for secrets, vaults, and service accounts.
use_when: Read or inject secrets through 1Password CLI
avoid_when: The user has not requested secret access
guardrails: Never print secret values unless explicitly requested for a secure context.

name: opencode
summary: Terminal-based AI coding agent.
use_when: Use an AI coding agent from the terminal
avoid_when: The task should stay within the current agent session
guardrails: Review generated diffs and project instructions before accepting changes.

name: openssl
summary: Cryptography, certificate, and TLS inspection toolkit.
use_when: Inspect certificates, generate keys, or test TLS connections
avoid_when: Secret key material would be exposed in logs or shell history
guardrails: Keep private keys out of command output, logs, and committed files.

name: ouch
summary: User-friendly archive compression and extraction CLI.
use_when: Compress or extract archives without remembering format-specific flags
avoid_when: Exact tar or zip flags are required for reproducible packaging
guardrails: List archive contents before extracting untrusted files.

name: php
summary: PHP runtime command-line interface.
use_when: Run PHP scripts or inspect PHP runtime version
avoid_when: Project commands should be invoked through Composer
guardrails: Prefer Composer scripts when composer.json defines the workflow.

name: pip
summary: Python package installer.
use_when: Install dependencies from requirements.txt
avoid_when: The project uses uv, Poetry, Conda, or another environment manager
guardrails: Prefer virtual environments over global pip installs.

name: pipx
summary: Install and run Python CLI applications in isolated environments.
use_when: Install Python CLI applications without polluting project environments
avoid_when: Installing project dependencies
guardrails: Do not use pipx for project dependency management.

name: playwright
summary: End-to-end browser testing and automation CLI.
use_when: Run browser-based tests or capture UI behavior
avoid_when: The project has no browser test setup
guardrails: Prefer configured project scripts for browser tests.

name: pnpm
summary: Fast disk-efficient JavaScript package manager.
use_when: Install and run scripts in pnpm-managed projects
avoid_when: The repo declares another package manager
guardrails: If pnpm-lock.yaml exists, avoid npm install unless explicitly requested.

name: podman
summary: Daemonless container engine compatible with many Docker workflows.
use_when: Build or run containers without Docker daemon
avoid_when: The project assumes Docker-specific behavior
guardrails: Confirm Docker compatibility assumptions before substituting Podman.

name: poetry
summary: Python packaging and dependency management tool.
use_when: Manage Python projects that use poetry.lock
avoid_when: The project uses uv.lock, requirements.txt only, or Conda
guardrails: If poetry.lock exists, prefer Poetry for dependency operations.

name: prettier
summary: Opinionated code formatter for JavaScript and related formats.
use_when: Format JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, Markdown, or JSON files
avoid_when: The repository uses another formatter for the target files
guardrails: Use --check when only verifying formatting.

name: procs
summary: Modern process viewer.
use_when: Inspect running processes with richer columns than ps
avoid_when: Scripts need portable process output
guardrails: Use stable system APIs for automation.

name: psql
summary: PostgreSQL interactive terminal.
use_when: Inspect PostgreSQL databases
avoid_when: Connection target and environment are unclear
guardrails: Confirm host, database, and environment before mutating PostgreSQL data.

name: pulumi
summary: Infrastructure as code CLI for Pulumi stacks.
use_when: Inspect, preview, or update Pulumi infrastructure stacks
avoid_when: Stack, backend, or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Use pulumi preview before infrastructure mutations.

name: pyright
summary: Static type checker for Python.
use_when: Run Python type checks in Pyright-configured projects
avoid_when: The project uses mypy or another type checker exclusively
guardrails: Use the repository's pyrightconfig.json when present.

name: pytest
summary: Python testing framework CLI.
use_when: Run Python tests
avoid_when: The project uses unittest commands or another test runner
guardrails: Prefer focused test paths before broad test suites when iterating.

name: python
summary: Python interpreter.
use_when: Run Python scripts or tooling
avoid_when: A project-specific environment manager should be used instead
guardrails: Prefer the project virtual environment when one exists.

name: q
summary: Amazon Q Developer command-line assistant.
use_when: Use Amazon Q Developer from the terminal
avoid_when: The task should stay inside the current agent session
guardrails: Review command permissions and generated changes before accepting them.

name: qwen
summary: Qwen command-line AI coding assistant.
use_when: Use Qwen CLI project context or agent workflows
avoid_when: The task should stay inside the current agent session
guardrails: Review generated diffs before accepting changes.

name: railway
summary: Railway deployment and project management CLI.
use_when: Deploy or inspect Railway projects
avoid_when: Project link or authentication state is unknown
guardrails: Confirm the linked Railway project before write operations.

name: redis-cli
summary: Redis command-line client.
use_when: Inspect Redis state or connectivity
avoid_when: Production keys could be modified or deleted unintentionally
guardrails: Never run destructive Redis commands without explicit confirmation.

name: rg
summary: Fast recursive text search for codebases.
use_when: Search text across a repository
Find symbols, config keys, logs, or error messages
avoid_when: Semantic AST rewriting
Structured JSON or YAML mutation
guardrails: Prefer exact or literal search flags when searching for fixed strings.

name: rga
summary: ripgrep wrapper for PDFs, archives, e-books, Office documents, and more.
use_when: Search non-plain-text files and archives
avoid_when: Plain source code search with rg is enough
guardrails: Prefer rg for normal source search and rga for document/archive search.

name: rtk
summary: Local shell wrapper used to run commands with workspace-specific behavior.
use_when: Running shell commands in a workspace that explicitly requires rtk
Preserving local command execution conventions
avoid_when: The workspace does not mention rtk
A command must bypass wrapper behavior for debugging
guardrails: Prefix shell commands with rtk when AGENTS.md requires it.
Run PowerShell built-ins through rtk powershell -NoProfile -Command on Windows.

name: ruby
summary: Ruby language runtime CLI.
use_when: Run Ruby scripts or inspect runtime version
avoid_when: Project commands should be invoked through Bundler
guardrails: Prefer bundle exec for project-local Ruby dependencies.

name: ruff
summary: Fast Python linter and formatter.
use_when: Lint or format Python code
avoid_when: The project uses another Python lint or format tool exclusively
guardrails: Use ruff check before ruff check --fix when reviewing impact.

name: rustup
summary: Rust toolchain installer and version manager.
use_when: Inspect or install Rust toolchains requested by a project
avoid_when: The task only needs cargo build or test
guardrails: Respect rust-toolchain files when selecting Rust versions.

name: sccache
summary: Compiler cache for Rust, C, C++, and other compilers.
use_when: Speed up repeated compiler builds
avoid_when: Reproducibility debugging requires a clean compiler cache
guardrails: Disable or clear compiler caches when diagnosing suspicious build artifacts.

name: sd
summary: Simple and fast find-and-replace CLI.
use_when: Replace text in files or streams with simpler syntax than sed
Do mechanical text substitutions in scripts
avoid_when: Structured code or config needs parser-aware edits
guardrails: Preview matches before recursive in-place replacements.

name: sed
summary: Stream editor for text substitution and filtering.
use_when: Transform text streams or make simple scripted substitutions
avoid_when: Structured code or config needs parser-aware edits
guardrails: Preview substitutions before using in-place write flags.

name: semgrep
summary: Static analysis and code search tool using semantic rules.
use_when: Run semantic code scanning or custom SAST rules
avoid_when: Rule source or scan target is unclear
guardrails: Review rule source before running broad scans.

name: sops
summary: Editor and automation tool for encrypted secrets files.
use_when: Edit or decrypt SOPS-managed secret files
avoid_when: Key access or target environment is unclear
guardrails: Avoid printing decrypted secrets and never commit plaintext outputs.

name: sqlite3
summary: SQLite command-line shell.
use_when: Inspect local SQLite databases
avoid_when: Mutating production or user data without a backup
guardrails: Back up SQLite database files before mutation.

name: starship
summary: Cross-shell prompt renderer.
use_when: Inspect or configure shell prompt behavior
avoid_when: The task is unrelated to interactive shell setup
guardrails: Keep prompt configuration changes scoped to the user or project config requested.

name: stern
summary: Multi-pod Kubernetes log tailing CLI.
use_when: Tail logs from multiple Kubernetes pods
avoid_when: Current Kubernetes context is unknown
guardrails: Confirm Kubernetes context and namespace before reading logs.

name: stripe
summary: Stripe CLI for local webhooks, API calls, and developer workflows.
use_when: Test Stripe webhooks or inspect Stripe API objects
avoid_when: Account, mode, or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm test mode versus live mode before write operations.

name: supabase
summary: Supabase local development and project management CLI.
use_when: Run local Supabase services or manage Supabase projects
avoid_when: Project link or credentials are unknown
guardrails: Confirm linked project and local versus remote target before mutations.

name: syft
summary: SBOM generator for container images and filesystems.
use_when: Generate software bills of materials
avoid_when: The scan target is unclear or too broad
guardrails: Treat SBOMs as potentially sensitive dependency disclosure artifacts.

name: taplo
summary: TOML formatter, linter, and language tooling.
use_when: Format or lint TOML files
avoid_when: The task only needs to read TOML without modifying it
guardrails: Use format checks before writing broad TOML changes.

name: tar
summary: Create and extract tar archives.
use_when: Inspect, create, or extract tar archives
avoid_when: The archive format is zip or another container
guardrails: List archive contents before extracting untrusted archives.

name: task
summary: Task runner using Taskfile.yml or Taskfile.yaml.
use_when: Run project-defined Taskfile tasks
avoid_when: Task names are ambiguous or may deploy or delete resources
guardrails: Inspect Taskfile definitions before running ambiguous tasks.

name: terraform
summary: Infrastructure as code CLI.
use_when: Inspect or plan Terraform infrastructure changes
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve infrastructure
guardrails: Do not run terraform apply or destroy without explicit confirmation.

name: terragrunt
summary: Thin wrapper for Terraform that manages remote state and repeated configuration.
use_when: Inspect or plan Terragrunt-managed infrastructure
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve infrastructure
guardrails: Do not apply or destroy infrastructure without explicit confirmation.

name: tldr
summary: Community-maintained concise command examples.
use_when: Quickly learn common examples for a command
avoid_when: Exact behavior requires the official manual or project docs
guardrails: Treat examples as hints and verify risky flags against official docs.

name: tofu
summary: OpenTofu infrastructure as code CLI.
use_when: Inspect or plan OpenTofu-compatible infrastructure changes
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve infrastructure
guardrails: Do not run tofu apply or destroy without explicit confirmation.

name: tokei
summary: Count code, comments, blanks, and files by language.
use_when: Summarize repository language and line-count composition
avoid_when: Exact build graph or dependency analysis is required
guardrails: Treat line counts as orientation, not engineering quality metrics.

name: tox
summary: Python test automation across environments.
use_when: Run Python tests across configured environments
avoid_when: The project uses nox, uv, or direct pytest scripts instead
guardrails: Use configured tox environments rather than inventing new ones.

name: tree
summary: Display directory structure as a tree.
use_when: Summarize repository or folder structure
avoid_when: The tree is too large without depth or ignore filters
guardrails: Limit depth in large repositories.

name: trivy
summary: Vulnerability, misconfiguration, secret, and SBOM scanner.
use_when: Scan containers, filesystems, repositories, or IaC for security issues
avoid_when: The scan target or output sensitivity is unclear
guardrails: Redact secrets and review vulnerability context before reporting results.

name: trufflehog
summary: Secret scanner for repositories, filesystems, and remote sources.
use_when: Scan git history or filesystems for secrets
avoid_when: Results would expose secret values in shared logs
guardrails: Redact detected secrets and avoid uploading sensitive scan output.

name: trunk
summary: Build, bundle, and serve Rust WebAssembly web applications.
use_when: Build or serve Trunk-based Rust WASM apps
avoid_when: The project does not use Trunk

confirmation_required_for: exposing dev servers on public interfaces

guardrails: Use the repository's Trunk.toml when present.

name: tsc
summary: TypeScript compiler and type checker.
use_when: Run TypeScript type checks or compilation
avoid_when: The project delegates type checking to another build tool only

confirmation_required_for: emitting compiled files into source directories

guardrails: Prefer noEmit type checks when verifying code without build output.

name: turbo
summary: High-performance build system for JavaScript and TypeScript monorepos.
use_when: Run Turborepo tasks in JS or TS monorepos
avoid_when: The project has no turbo.json or package scripts using turbo
guardrails: Prefer package manager scripts that wrap turbo commands.

name: typos
summary: Source code spell checker.
use_when: Check spelling in source code, docs, and config
avoid_when: The project has many domain-specific words without configuration
guardrails: Review spell-check replacements in identifiers and domain terms.

name: unzip
summary: Extract and inspect zip archives.
use_when: Inspect or extract zip archives
avoid_when: The archive format is tar or another container
guardrails: List archive contents before extracting untrusted archives.

name: uv
summary: Fast Python package and environment manager.
use_when: Manage Python dependencies and environments in uv projects
avoid_when: The project clearly uses Poetry, Conda, or plain pip only
guardrails: If uv.lock exists, prefer uv for Python package and environment commands.

name: vercel
summary: Vercel project deployment CLI.
use_when: Deploy or inspect Vercel projects
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve deployment or Vercel
guardrails: Confirm deployment intent before creating remote deployments.

name: vite
summary: Frontend development server and build tool.
use_when: Run or build Vite frontend projects
avoid_when: The project uses another frontend framework build command

confirmation_required_for: exposing dev servers on public interfaces

guardrails: Use project package scripts when they wrap Vite configuration.

name: vitest
summary: Vite-native JavaScript and TypeScript test runner.
use_when: Run Vitest unit or component tests
avoid_when: The project uses Jest or another configured test runner
guardrails: Prefer focused test files while iterating.

name: volta
summary: JavaScript toolchain manager for pinning Node, npm, pnpm, and yarn.
use_when: Use a project-pinned JavaScript toolchain
avoid_when: The repo uses another Node version manager and no Volta config
guardrails: Only treat Volta as local requirement when package.json declares a volta section.

name: wasm-pack
summary: Build and package Rust-generated WebAssembly.
use_when: Build Rust crates targeting WebAssembly packages
avoid_when: The Rust project does not target wasm
guardrails: Confirm wasm target and package output before publishing.

name: watchexec
summary: Run commands when watched files change.
use_when: Re-run arbitrary commands on file changes
avoid_when: CI needs a single deterministic command
guardrails: Keep watched commands idempotent and stop watchers after use.

name: wrangler
summary: Cloudflare Workers and Pages CLI.
use_when: Develop and deploy Cloudflare Workers or Pages projects
avoid_when: The task does not explicitly involve Cloudflare
guardrails: Treat deployment and secret operations as remote writes.

name: xh
summary: Fast and friendly HTTP client inspired by HTTPie.
use_when: Send HTTP requests with readable syntax and output
avoid_when: curl compatibility or exact curl flags are required
guardrails: Confirm method, URL, and auth headers before mutating requests.

name: yarn
summary: JavaScript package manager.
use_when: Install and run scripts in Yarn-managed projects
avoid_when: The repo declares npm, pnpm, or bun instead
guardrails: Do not mix package managers in one repository.

name: yazi
summary: Fast terminal file manager with async I/O.
use_when: Explore and manage files interactively in the terminal
avoid_when: Automated workflows require auditable file operations
guardrails: Use explicit shell commands for scripted file mutations.

name: yq
summary: Command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, and properties processor.
use_when: Query or transform YAML files
Inspect structured configuration from the shell
avoid_when: Editing configuration without preserving comments or formatting matters
guardrails: Validate yq output before overwriting existing files.

name: zellij
summary: Terminal workspace and multiplexer.
use_when: Manage terminal sessions and panes interactively
avoid_when: Non-interactive command execution is required
guardrails: Keep automated task execution outside interactive multiplexers.

name: zip
summary: Create and update zip archives.
use_when: Package files into zip archives
avoid_when: The target format should preserve Unix ownership or permissions
guardrails: Confirm include and exclude patterns before creating release archives.

name: zoxide
summary: Smarter cd command based on frecency.
use_when: Navigate frequently used directories in interactive shells
avoid_when: Scripts need explicit deterministic paths
guardrails: Use explicit paths in scripts and reproducible instructions.
